query: I want to see all the available SCAPI APIs for my sandbox instance. How do I browse the full list of API families?
I need to check what fields the product API returns before I build my integration. How do I inspect the full schema definition?
What endpoints are available in the shopper-orders API? I want to see the paths and their request/response shapes.
I'm trying to understand the SCAPI data model for baskets. How do I look up all the properties and nested objects?
Before building a catalog sync, I need to check if there's a bulk product update endpoint available in the SCAPI admin APIs. How do I explore the schemas?
I want to compare the schema versions between two SCAPI releases to see what changed in the product search response.
I need to actually make a SCAPI call to search for products. What's the correct curl command to hit the shopper-search endpoint?
How do I generate TypeScript interfaces from a local OpenAPI spec file I already have?
I want to build a custom API client in the tooling SDK for a new SCAPI endpoint. How do I set up the OAuth middleware?
How do I configure SLAS authentication for my headless storefront to get shopper tokens?
